name: Alex Johnson
title: AI Engineer
summary: AI Engineer with 4 years of experience developing and deploying machine learning models in production environments. Expertise in Python, TensorFlow, and MLflow for building end-to-end ML pipelines. Passionate about applying AI to solve real-world business problems in healthcare, manufacturing, and finance domains.
